title: American-Style Hash Browns
description: A comforting and delicious side dish made with shredded potatoes, onions, and bell peppers.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine grated potatoes, onion, and bell pepper.
Add salt and black pepper to taste, and mix well.
Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add potato mixture to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the edges start to brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
